rationale: Replaced the fragile indexOf-based CSS block helper with PostCSS rule parsing and exact/grouped selector matching.
Removed the redundant outline-offset from the base button focus-visible rule where outline remains none.
Changed reduced-motion transition and animation durations from 0.01ms to 0s.
Automated review summary; the actionable findings from this review are tracked by their individual inline comments.
Added forced-colors focus-visible outlines for button-like controls that otherwise rely on box-shadow focus rings.
Automated review summary with no standalone action beyond its linked inline suggestion.
Strengthened disabled button and link-button selectors so disabled styles override hover glow and transform states.
